---
name: Translation / Localisation Request
about: Request a new language, report a translation error, or offer to contribute a translation
title: "[Translation] "
labels: "type: localisation"
---

## Type of request

- [ ] New language support
- [ ] Fix an existing translation error
- [ ] Improve / review existing translation
- [ ] Add missing strings in an existing language

## Language

**Language name:** (e.g. Amharic)
**Language code:** (e.g. `am` — see [ISO 639-1](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_ISO_639-1_codes))
**Country / region this would serve:** (e.g. Ethiopia)

## Current languages for reference

English, Tok Pisin, Spanish, Tagalog, Nepali, Ukrainian, Russian, Kyrgyz, Swahili, Bengali, Hindi, Indonesian, Mongolian

## Description

Describe the translation need in detail. If reporting an error, quote the incorrect text and provide the correct version.

**Incorrect text (if applicable):**
> paste the wrong string here

**Suggested correction:**
> paste the correct string here

## Estimated reach

How many girls / users would this language addition serve? Any data or context to support the request is helpful.

## Can you help with the translation?

- [ ] Yes, I can translate
- [ ] Yes, I can review translations done by others
- [ ] No, I'm flagging the need but can't translate myself

## Additional context

Any other context — partner organisations in the region, existing content resources, or cultural considerations the translation team should know about.
